name: ExchangeMT Possible Data Theft - Email with Attachment Outside Organization
description: Detects emails with attachments being sent to recipients outside the organization's domain, which could indicate data exfiltration. This rule focuses on identifying emails with significant data sizes (attachments) being sent externally.

prompts.prompt: Possible data theft detected: Email with a large attachment sent to an external recipient. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Sender** {sender}, **Recipient** {recipient}, **Subject** {subject}, **Data Size** {data_size} bytes, **Attachment Name** {attachment_name}. Investigate this high-risk exfiltration attempt immediately.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the email sending event.

parameters.name: sender
parameters.description: The email address of the sender.

parameters.name: recipient
parameters.description: The email address of the recipient (outside the organization).

parameters.name: data_size
parameters.description: The size of the email, including attachments, in bytes.

parameters.name: attachment_name
parameters.description: The name of the attachment, if available.
